name: eastmoney-roadshow-transcript-summary
title: EastMoney Roadshow Digest (Transcript + Summary)｜东方财富路演纪要生成
description: A reliability-first transcript & summary skill for public EastMoney roadshow replays. It validates public replay URLs, extracts structured metadata, prefers subtitle discovery, falls back to bounded media+ASR, and produces transcript, clean transcript, summary, brief, and run report outputs.
author: Tywin

url.description: Public EastMoney roadshow replay URL, e.g. https://roadshow.eastmoney.com/luyan/5149204

system: ffmpeg (required for audio extraction / ASR fallback)
